headline: 2 Services Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: Business services providers use their specialized expertise to help enterprises streamline operations and cut costs. Still, investors are uneasy as firms face challenges from AI-driven disruptors and tightening corporate budgets. These doubts have certainly contributed to services stocks’ recent underperformance - over the past six months, the industry’s 8% gain has fallen behind the S&P 500’s 10.8% rise.
